/usr/bin/ar qc libcedar_client.a CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/connection_pool.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/service_discovery.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/load_balancer.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/query_router.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/session_manager.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/retry_handler.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/metrics_collector.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/jwt_manager.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/logger.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/config_loader.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/config_watcher.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/async_query.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/cluster_manager.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/docker_manager.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/k8s_manager.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/cluster_monitor.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/auto_scaler.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/cluster_backup.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_client.dir/src/client/cedar_client.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcedar_client.a
